Frequently Asked Questions
1. RPSC Senior Teacher TGT Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 19 August 2025.
2. RPSC Senior Teacher TGT 07/2025 Exam Date 2026?
The Examination will be conducted in 12-18 July 2026
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Rajasthan RPSC Sr. Teacher TGT 07/2025 Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the RPSC Rajasthan TGT Sr. Teacher Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. RPSC TGT Sr. Teacher Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Rajasthan RPSC Senior Teacher Grade II TGT Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 17 September 2025.
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 17 September 2025 .
7. How can I apply for RPSC Rajasthan Sr. Teacher Grade II TGT Exam?
Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result® .
tables: RPSC Rajasthan TGT Senior Teacher 07/2025 Exam City 2026

Rajasthan Public Service Commission has released RPSC Senior Teacher TGT Exam City 2026. Those candidates who are interested in this RPSC TGT Senior Teacher Grade II Online Form Vacancy can Download the Admit Card. Read the notification for RPSC TGT 2025 eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Details, age limit, pay scale and all other information.

Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC Senior Teacher TGT Online Form 2025 RPSC Sr. Teacher TGT Grade II Advt No. : 07/2025 : Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM Since 2012
Important Dates Application Begin : 19/08/2025 Last Date for Apply : 17/09/2025 Fee Payment Last Date : 17/09/2025 Exam Date : 12-18 July 2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fees General / Other State : 600 /- OBC / BC / SC / ST / PH : 400 /- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking / Online Only.
RPSC Senior Teacher TGT Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2026 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation as per RPSC Senior Teacher Grade II Recruitment 2025 Rules.

How to Fill RPSC Sr. Teacher TGT Online Form 2025 Rajasthan Public Service Commission has Released the RPSC Senior Teacher Grade II Online Form 2026 Notification. Candidate Can Apply Between 19 August 2025 to 17 September 2025. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in RPSC Senior Teacher Grade II Pre Online 2026. Kindly Check and College the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form. For the latest updates on Sarkari Result, admit card, answer key, and result, always visit SarkariResult.com, the official website for Sarkari Result in India (Since 2012).
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online
Download the Sarkari Result® Mobile App from SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result® for the latest updates.
